title: herobrine returned
description: we're in the spooky month, being the spooky month i decided to add some more threats and horrors to the pack i hope you enjoy
body:
Newest version has now added the knocker and the steve dweller

this mod packs brings herobrine to the game and is for those who want to face a challenging emeny while playing. 

this pack may change a lot and feedback will be amazing, if you have any ideas for mods to add i'd love to hear them and i encourage you to add and change the pack as much as you want

for the best experience of this pack you'd want to config the mod "fromthefog" and give herobrine control, to do so turn cheats on when making the world (or open to lan to do so), then type /function fromthefog:admin/config, procced to the last page in the chat config and then click on the second option which should change the config menu which tells you herobrine is in control, you may need to config other mods to your liking too.

i also suggest to play on multiplayer if you want a more chaotic experience

join the discord if you have any questions are need help with the config
